summary: Excellent soundboard capture of a legendary, well‑played four‑hour Berkeley concert despite missing setlist details.
review: The remastered soundboard tape delivers crystal‑clear audio with slightly hot vocals, preserving what reviewers call one of the most well‑played and well‑sung shows in Dead history. Although only a single reel survives and the complete setlist is unknown, the performance is praised as epic and flawless throughout its four‑hour run.

ai_rating.rationale: A single detailed 5‑star review highlights both an outstanding musical performance and excellent soundboard quality, leading to a high rating but limited confidence due to the small sample size.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Clear, crisp soundboard recording; vocals are slightly hot in the mix; remaster matches other versions and sounds very good overall.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Exact setlist is unknown because only one reel survives, but reviewers emphasize an epic four‑hour performance that was consistently well played and sung.
